description: Canvas LMS (Instructure) for Claude — courses, grades, assignments, planner, files
name: io.github.chrischall/canvas-parent-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Canvas instance base URL, e.g. https://cms.instructure.com
environmentVariables.name: CANVAS_BASE_URL

environmentVariables.description: Canvas personal access token (pick ONE auth mode: this, USERNAME+PASSWORD, COOKIE, or OAuth triple)
environmentVariables.name: CANVAS_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Canvas login username/email — pair with CANVAS_PASSWORD for auto-login (no SSO/2FA)
environmentVariables.name: CANVAS_USERNAME

environmentVariables.description: Canvas password for auto-login — required iff CANVAS_USERNAME is set
environmentVariables.name: CANVAS_PASSWORD

environmentVariables.description: Pre-minted Canvas session cookie jar (from canvas-parent-mcp-login or qr-login CLI)
environmentVariables.name: CANVAS_COOKIE

environmentVariables.description: Canvas OAuth client ID (required if not using CANVAS_TOKEN)
environmentVariables.name: CANVAS_CLIENT_ID

environmentVariables.description: Canvas OAuth client secret (required if not using CANVAS_TOKEN)
environmentVariables.name: CANVAS_CLIENT_SECRET

environmentVariables.description: Canvas OAuth refresh token (required if not using CANVAS_TOKEN)
environmentVariables.name: CANVAS_REFRESH_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Friendly name for the Canvas instance (defaults to the host portion of the base URL)
environmentVariables.name: CANVAS_NAME
